description_long: This is a classic outdoor park bench featuring a seat and backrest made from dark-stained wooden slats, supported by ornate black metal armrests and legs. The bench has three horizontal wooden slats forming the backrest and several closely spaced wooden slats for the seat, providing both comfort and durability. The armrests are elegantly curved with decorative scrollwork, seamlessly integrated into the sturdy metal frame. The legs are also metal, slightly flared for stability, and connected by a crossbar for additional support. The overall design is both functional and aesthetically pleasing, suitable for public parks, sidewalks, or garden settings. The materials and construction suggest weather resistance and long-term outdoor use.
description: A dark wood and black metal park bench with decorative curved armrests and a slatted seat and backrest, designed for outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, highlighting the three wooden backrest slats and the broad, flat seat.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the curved metal armrest and the thickness of the wooden slats, as well as the ornate leg design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slats and the simple, sturdy metal frame supporting the bench.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the curved armrest and the arrangement of the seat slats.
attribute_leg_design: curved black metal legs with decorative scrollwork
